heroImageAlt: Helpful resources for counselling and bereavement support
heroShortDescription: Helpful links and downloadable leaflets for additional support.
mainIntro1: Whilst our hospice is independently run, we are a subsidiary charity of LOROS Hospice and work closely with their staff to support families in the Leicestershire area.
mainIntro2: We also communicate closely with national charities through the likes of Macmillan Nurses and Admiral Nurses to provide our patients and families with a wide variety of relevant and useful resources.
mainIntro3: We have listed below some links to information that we feel might be useful to the families that we support.
mainIntro4: (Please note that by clicking on these links you will be taken to an external web page via a new browser window. To return to Dove Cottage, simply close the window.)

resources.title: Help with benefits
resources.linkLabel: Finding the right benefits and help leaflet

referralIntro: To enquire about any of our services please complete the
referralOutro: and a member of our team will be in touch.
